extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian won stage 2 with a late sprint after CATAPASS Richard opened the race up in final meters, beating LAPORTE who led out.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma chased down Bayer's 9-second advantage over final climb despite having yellow, burning matches for Laporte sprint
Catapass attacked inside final kilometer, inadvertently creating slipstream gap that Alaphilippe exploited straight through middle
EF attempted multiple late attacks within 1km to go despite having sprint option, fragmenting their leadout

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Tour de France winner doing leadout work for Laporte, strong positioning but not racing for himself yet
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: positive: recovering from long COVID, looked very prepared yesterday, leading Cofidis despite months of fatigue
rider_signals.BAYER Tobias: neutral: attacked over final climb gaining 9 seconds but Jumbo immediately shut down despite having race lead
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: negative: had perfect Vingegaard leadout and yellow jersey but couldn't finish sprint, legs not there
rider_signals.CATAPASS Richard: positive: late attack inside 1km created winning move even though he couldn't sustain it himself
